channel.title: Apps on Wayne Cater
channel.description: Recent content in Apps on Wayne Cater

item.title: TypoTheGame
item.description: Released in March 2026, TypoTheGame is a FREE MacOS desktop game that can turn practicing typing skills into fun! Typo runs on minimum macOS version 14.0 (Sonoma) to 26.3.1 (Tahoe). Want to see more details about TypoTheGame? Check out the readme.txt file. View the privacy policy for TypoTheGame! Download TypoTheGame
